---
title: "Uses (March 2026)"
date: "2026-03-03"
description: "Always be testing."
image: "../../files/img/transparent-placeholder.png"
categories:
  - technology
format:
  html: 
    fig-cap-location: margin
    code-copy: true
---

A couple of updates to my [Uses](../2026-01-01-uses/) page.

**Software**: I went through the entire test period with [iA Writer](https://ia.net/writer) and decided it was too much for my needs (though, the fonts are very nice and [freely available](https://github.com/iaolo/iA-Fonts); I use them in Obsidian). I have switched to [Typora](http://www.typora.io). I have also switched away from [iTerm2](https://www.iterm2.com) to [Ghostty](https://ghostty.org); though, to be honest, I use the built in terminal in Positron far more than a standalone terminal emulator.
